response.step_by_step_log: 1. Scanned the entire video. 2. Determined that the video is a slideshow of static screens with background music. 3. Verified audio content across multiple time points; the background music is purely instrumental with no vocals. 4. Segmented the video into scenes based on visual content changes (title screen, attention screen, message slideshow). 5. Since no vocal music is present, set contains_vocal_music to false and filled song-related fields with null.
response.global_summary: A video displaying a waiting room screen for the 'hololive 1st live 2026 holox' event, featuring a slideshow of fan and staff messages set to background instrumental music.

scenes.description: Initial title screen for the 'hololive 1st live 2026 holox' concert showing event information, including date and venue. Instrumental music is playing.
Information screen regarding concert safety and etiquette, specifically mentioning flashing lights and cheering rules. Instrumental music continues.
A slideshow sequence featuring various messages from staff and fans, updating periodically. The same instrumental music track continues to loop.
